text_excerpt: News | Mel Stride MP Skip to main content Main navigation News & Articles In Parliament Is Mel Stride my MP? My Map Campaigns My Plan Contact Newsletter News Mel Visits Promise School Following Fire to Support Pupils and Staff Monday, 30 March, 2026 Sir Mel Stride, MP for Central Devon, visited The Promise School in Okehampton following the recent fire to meet with school leaders and discuss support for pupils and families. During the visit, Mel met with CEO Rachel Shaw to hear how the school is managing temporary arrangements and planning for recovery. The visit follow the immediate contact the MP had with the school following the fire...
